name: ironbee-devtools-vscode
description: VSCode Extension for the IronBee DevTools - Verification and Intelligence Layer for AI Coding Agents

ironbeeDevTools.enable.description: Enable or disable the IronBee DevTools extension

ironbeeDevTools.telemetry.enable.description: Allow sending anonymous install/uninstall telemetry. When false, also disables telemetry for the uninstall hook.

ironbeeDevTools.browser.headless.description: Run browser in headless mode (no visible window)

ironbeeDevTools.browser.persistent.description: Enable persistent browser context (keeps cookies, localStorage, etc.)

ironbeeDevTools.browser.userDataDir.description: Directory for persistent browser user data

ironbeeDevTools.browser.useSystemBrowser.description: Use system-installed browser instead of bundled Playwright browser

ironbeeDevTools.browser.cdp.enable.description: Enable Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) attach mode (Chromium only)

ironbeeDevTools.browser.cdp.endpointUrl.description: CDP endpoint URL to attach (http://host:port or ws://...)

ironbeeDevTools.browser.cdp.openInspect.description: When loopback CDP attach fails and Chrome is running, open chrome://inspect/#remote-debugging

ironbeeDevTools.browser.consoleMessagesB.description: Max console messages to buffer in browser (default: 1000)

ironbeeDevTools.browser.httpRequestsBuff.description: Max HTTP requests to buffer in browser (default: 1000)

ironbeeDevTools.install.chromium.description: Download Chromium, headless shell, and ffmpeg (Playwright) into the default cache when the extension activates.

ironbeeDevTools.install.firefox.description: Download Firefox (Playwright) into the default cache on activate.

ironbeeDevTools.install.webkit.description: Download WebKit (Playwright) into the default cache on activate.

ironbeeDevTools.platform.browser.enable.description: Enable the Browser platform: Playwright-powered browser automation, DevTools inspection, and visual debugging. Registered as the 'ironbee-dt-browser' MCP server.

ironbeeDevTools.platform.browser.availab.description: Comma-separated Browser tool domains to enable (e.g. navigation,interaction,a11y). Empty = all. Domains: a11y, content, debug, figma, interaction, navigation, o11y, react, run, scenario, stub, sync.

ironbeeDevTools.platform.node.enable.description: Enable the Node platform: non-blocking debugging of Node.js processes via the Inspector Protocol (tracepoints, logpoints, exceptionpoints, watches). Registered as the 'ironbee-dt-node' MCP server.

ironbeeDevTools.platform.node.availableT.description: Comma-separated Node tool domains to enable. Empty = all. Domains: debug, run.

ironbeeDevTools.platform.backend.enable.description: Enable the Backend platform: runtime-agnostic backend verification (HTTP/gRPC/GraphQL/WebSocket) plus log capture (file/docker/kubernetes) and database verification (Postgres/MySQL/SQLite). Registered as the 'ironbee-dt-backend' MCP server.

ironbeeDevTools.platform.backend.availab.description: Comma-separated Backend tool domains to enable. Empty = all. Domains: db, log, o11y, request, run.

ironbeeDevTools.node.inspectorHost.description: Inspector host for Node platform when MCP runs in Docker (e.g., host.docker.internal)

ironbeeDevTools.node.consoleMessagesBuff.description: Max console messages to buffer in Node process (default: 1000)

ironbeeDevTools.opentelemetry.instrument.description: Comma-separated user interaction events to instrument (default: click). E.g. click,submit

ironbeeDevTools.bedrock.enable.description: Enable Amazon Bedrock for AI-powered features

ironbeeDevTools.bedrock.imageModelId.description: Amazon Bedrock model ID for image embeddings

ironbeeDevTools.bedrock.textModelId.description: Amazon Bedrock model ID for text embeddings

ironbeeDevTools.bedrock.visionModelId.description: Amazon Bedrock model ID for vision tasks

ironbeeDevTools.figma.accessToken.description: Figma API access token for design comparison features

ironbeeDevTools.toolOutputSchemaDisable.description: Omit tool output schema from MCP registration (can reduce token usage)

ironbeeDevTools.showVisualizer.description: Show Visualizer: Enabled/Disabled. Controls whether the visualizer UI and its WebSocket server are active.

ironbeeDevTools.visualizer.wsPort.description: WebSocket port for the visualizer event stream.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:visualizer && npm run compile
scripts.build:visualizer: cd visualizer && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:visualizer && npm run compile
